fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item associated with the entry.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code for the entry.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity on the line expressed in base units of measure.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the entry.

fields.name: Receipt/Shipment No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the receipt or shipment number associated with the entry.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number associated with the entry.

fields.name: Appl.-to Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied to.

fields.name: Warranty Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a warranty date must be entered manually.

fields.name: Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expiration date, if any, of the item carrying the item tracking number.

fields.name: Qty. to Handle (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that you want to handle in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Qty. to Invoice (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many of the items, in base units of measure, are scheduled for invoicing.

fields.name: Quantity Handled (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of serial, lot or package numbers shipped or received for the associated document line, expressed in base units of measure.

fields.name: Quantity Invoiced (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of serial, lot or package numbers that are invoiced with the associated document line, expressed in base units of measure.

fields.name: New Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a new serial number that will take the place of the serial number in the Serial No. field.

fields.name: New Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a new lot number that will take the place of the lot number in the Lot No. field.

fields.name: Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lot number of the item being handled for the associated document line.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Appl.-from Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied from.

fields.name: New Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies a new expiration date.

fields.name: Package No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the package number of the item being handled for the associated document line.

fields.name: New Package No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a new package number that will take the place of the package number in the Package No. field.
